title: Zalaegerszeg, Zala — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zalaegerszeg, Zala: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zalaegerszeg is a city in Zala with a population of 55,152. A city in western Hungary near the Slovenian border, known for its Göcsej Museum, thermal baths, and the nearby Zala Springs Golf Resort.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
